zh.Erfenbach, Kaiserslautern, Pfalz, Bayern: 德國貝也藍德可萊斯 凱澤斯勞特艾分巴賀
zh.lifeSummary: 當Laurette van Loon於1150年出生在比利時利包格波格洛時，她的父親Lodewijk I van Loon41歲，母親Agnes de Metz36歲。她於1172年與Gilles de Montaigu結婚。她去世於1193年在她的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.Erfenbach, Kaiserslautern, Pfalz, Bayern: 德国貝也藍德可萊斯 凱澤斯勞特艾分巴賀
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Laurette van Loon于1150年出生在比利时利包格波格洛时，她的父亲Lodewijk I van Loon41岁，母亲Agnes de Metz36岁。她于1172年与Gilles de Montaigu结婚。她去世于1193年在她的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Loon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Lond, from Middle English launde ‘glade’, or from one of the placenames derived from it such as Laund (of which there are examples in Yorkshire, Lancashire, and Leicestershire), or from the abbey of this name in Leicestershire. Compare Lon .
possibly a variant of English Lund , which is either a topographic name from Old Norse lundr ‘grove’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word.

variants.name: Lon
meanings: English: probably a variant of Lond, from Middle English launde ‘glade’, or from one of the placenames derived from it such as Laund (of which there are examples in Yorkshire, Lancashire, and Leicestershire), or from the abbey of this name in Leicestershire. Compare Lown .
Cambodian: written លន់, corresponding to the Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘(to be) superb’. Compare   Lun   4.

Burmese (Shan): from a personal name usually forming part of a compound name, of unexplained etymology. Compare   Lone   4. — Note: Since Shans do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Lundy
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from any of several places called Lundie, for example one near Doune in Perthshire.
Irish: topographic name from Anglo-Norman French de la Launde ‘of the glade’. Compare Lown 1.

nameMeanings.name: Laurette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Laurette van Loon was born in 1150, in Borgloon, Limburg, Belgium, her father, Lodewijk I van Loon, was 41 and her mother, Agnes de Metz, was 36. She married Gilles de Montaigu in 1172. She died in 1193, in her hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Laurette van Loon est née en 1150, à Borgloon, Limbourg, Belgique, son père, Lodewijk I van Loon, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Metz, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Gilles de Montaigu en 1172. Elle est décédée en 1193, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Laurette van Loon 1150 in Borgloon, Limburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lodewijk I van Loon 41 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Metz 36. Sie hat 1172 Gilles de Montaigu geheiratet. Sie starb 1193 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Laurette van Loon è nata il nel 1150 nel Borgloon, Limburgo, Belgio, sua padre, Lodewijk I van Loon, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Metz, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Gilles de Montaigu nel 1172. Morì nel 1193, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Laurette van Loonが1150年にベルギーリンブルグボルグロオンで生まれた時，父Lodewijk I van Loonは41歳，母Agnes de Metzは36歳であった。1172年にGilles de Montaiguと結婚した。彼女は1193年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Laurette van Loon(이)가 1150년 벨기에 림버그 볼그루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lodewijk I van Loon(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Metz(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1172년 Gilles de Montaigu(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1193년 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Laurette van Loon nasceu em 1150, em Borgloon, Limburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Lodewijk I van Loon, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Metz, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilles de Montaigu em 1172. Ela faleceu em 1193, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laurette van Loon родилась в 1150 г. в местности борглун, лимбург, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Lodewijk I van Loon было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Metz, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilles de Montaigu в 1172 г. Она умерла в 1193 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Laurette van Loon nació en 1150, en Borgloon, Limburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Lodewijk I van Loon, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Agnes de Metz, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Gilles de Montaigu en 1172. Murió en 1193, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
